title: fragaria elatior var. moschata
intro: Fragaria elatior var. moschata, also known as the musky strawberry, is a lesser-known variety of the strawberry plant with a unique musky fragrance. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The musky strawberry has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Fragaria elatior var. moschata often include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
